_doc: Override crop boxes for cases where pdfimages doesn't yield 1 PNG per audit entry. Three categories: (1) workspace cover-page filtering, (2) composite figures rendered as multi-image, (3) scanned PDFs (2021 BCD).
_bbox_format: [x0, y0, x1, y1] in pixel coords. For 'page_jpeg' source, coords are in the embedded page-JPEG's pixel space (typically 1275×1650 for 2021 BCD). For 'render' source, coords are in pixels at the given render DPI (200).

skip_pages._doc: Pages to skip entirely beyond the cover page-1. 2022B has 9 pages with formula sheet on pages 1-2.

render_overrides._doc: Page 2 has Q3 (composite vector multi-choice) and Q8 (circle figure). Render at 200dpi (1654x2339), crop two regions.

entries.comment: Q3 composite: reference vector ā + 5 sub-fig candidates A-E (2 rows). y_min covers ref vector inline with question text.

render_overrides._doc: Q13 composite at 200dpi (1654x2339): linear y=ax+b reference (right column) + 5 parabola sub-figs A-E (left). Single combined crop.

entries.comment: Q13 composite block (5 parabolas + linear reference)

render_overrides._doc: 2.4 cone composite at 200dpi (1654x2339): frustum (left) + full cone (right) side-by-side.

page_jpeg_overrides._doc: 2021B has formula sheet on page 1 → content pages 2-8. Bboxes calibrated against grid-overlay thumbnails of /tmp/figextract/2021B/pages/p-00X-Y.jpg.
2021C and 2021D have NO formula sheet — content starts page 1, so page numbers shift -1 vs 2021A/B. Verified visually that 2021C page 5 cube position matches 2021B page 6 cube position (same bbox).
